title: More Tools (Polymer)
description: Server-side: adds hammers, excavators and saws!
body:
### Overview
A server-side mod (also works in singleplayer) which adds new tools, such as:
- Hammer & Excavator
  - Allows breaking blocks in a 3x3 pattern
- Saw
  - Allows destroying trees in one go (except big ones)
- Vein Hammer
  - Destroys ore veins in one go
- Vein Excavator
  - Same for shovel-able resources such as clay
  
While sneaking, they will function like their vanilla counterparts instead.  

Some translations are also available, follow [this link](https://github.com/JongWasTaken/moretools/tree/master/src/main/resources/assets/moretools/lang) to see all supported languages. If you end up adding a language, I would appreciate if you could open an issue or pull request on GitHub, so that it can be made available for everybody.
  
Thanks to Polymer, this mod can be used server-side only.  
The player can also install this mod on their client to unlock a preview before actually breaking blocks, like shown in the gallery image.
  
To have textures load correctly on servers, you should use [Polymer's AutoHost feature](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/). 
  
Please open an issue on the GitHub page if you think you encountered a bug.  
### Crafting  
![Hammer crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bd760467eeddb48b66b643343846f2b4e3e2453.png)
![Excavator crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/269c9d773342f2136d76177f4f47afe2de9b111f.png)
![Saw crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05b158f25ec539e224af518c1dffb8acda5ee703.png)
![Vein hammer crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7a9419bbb55efdb761d203905af19af6ac77716.png)  
The above recipes apply to all materials.  
Netherite tools are obtained with a smithing table, just like vanilla tools.
